mathematical_prior.action_functional_effect: treat frame0 palette operators as global interaction terms spanning pixel, boundary, region, frame, pair, batch, and scorer axes
mathematical_prior.hard_constraint: frame1 repair modes require counterfactual measurement before allocation because no live frame1 palette mode exists
mathematical_prior.observation: canonical K16 palette has one identity mode, fifteen frame0 non-identity modes, and zero frame1 modes

mathematical_prior.action_functional_effect: treat frame0 palette transforms as global interaction terms before entropy coding and before per-region selector choices
mathematical_prior.hard_constraint: same-axis stackability remeasurement required before exact budget or score authority
mathematical_prior.observation: live K16 palette contains fifteen frame0 non-identity modes, one identity mode, and zero frame1 modes

mathematical_prior.action_functional_effect: separate before-coder distribution shaping from at-coder boundary savings before stack selection
mathematical_prior.hard_constraint: archive-native byte accounting and receiver proof required before exact handoff
mathematical_prior.observation: at-coder transforms can only exploit model and codeword integer-boundary slack, not post-coder byte permutations
